title: koeleria johnstonii
intro: Koeleria johnstonii is a species of grass within the Poaceae family, commonly known as Koeler's bluegrass or Johnston's bluegrass. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits associated with Koeleria johnstonii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and even exhibit antimicrobial properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Koeleria johnstonii is prepared as a tea or infusions, allowing individuals to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
